steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify all dependencies (t0001_stt_benchmark, t0004_vocabulary_biasing_experiment) are completed.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Run Granite Speech 4.1 2B batch, biased, compiled, and post-processing variants on all 93 gold-92 clips; compute metrics.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Write results_summary.md, results_detailed.md, metrics.json, prediction assets, and mark task completed.
